name: Bug Report

labels: ["bug"]

---

## Before You Submit

**Please search [existing issues](https://github.com/elwin/handless/issues) to avoid duplicates.** Your bug may already be reported!

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## System Information

**App Version:**

<!-- You can find this in the app settings or about section -->

**Operating System:**

<!-- e.g., Windows 11 24H2, Windows 10 22H2 -->

**CPU:**

<!-- e.g., Apple M2, Apple M4, Intel Core i9 -->

**GPU:**

<!-- e.g., Apple M2 GPU, Intel UHD Graphics -->

## Logs

<!-- Please attach relevant logs to help us diagnose the issue. You can find the log directory by going to Settings > About in the app. -->
